title: LAB FISH Laboratory Magnetic Stirrer 1800PRM Magnetic Mixer Max Stirring 3000ml Capacity Stir Plate with Stir Bar Egg for Lab and Homebrew
description:
About this item
【POWERFUL STIRRING】Durable brushless motor with powerful stirring speed and wide range of stepless speed up to 1800 rpm.
【LARGE MIXING VOLUME】The recommended stirring volume is 1L-3L, this mini magnetic mixer is suitable for stirring work in a variety of environments, such as home brewing yeast fermenters.
【MULTIFUNCTION USE】Ideal for various applications, including stirring and mixing in school laboratory, industry, agriculture, food processing and home brewing. Tip: Not suitable for stirring high viscosity liquid.
【COMPACT&PORTABLE DESING】Compact design for easy storage and light weight for portable use. High speed mixing while providing great stability and quiet operation.
【EXCELLENT SATISFACTION】1 year Limited Warranty. If you have any issue, we're always here to help you.Labfish enables to continually make improvement of products based on suggestion.
reviews_5s:
Works wonderfully.I purchased this out of ongoing frustration with a competing item that was literally only a few dollars cheaper. Below is a list of all of the items this stirrer aces, and which the marginally cheaper version bombed.

1. The top plate thoughtfully has its center clearly marked, making it VERY easy to align the center of the container whose contents are to be stirred and the stir bar directly over the magnetic center. This eliminates small and light containers from being jostled into a new position if one had to guess at the actual physical center position.
3. The stir bar starts moving when the unit is turned on, even at its slowest speed. Lesser models require turning to a sufficiently high speed for the stir bar to "catch", then the speed turned down to something usable.
4. The power jack is high quality, and the included power supply appears to be very high quality as well
5. This unit is basically silent! Compared to others with loud motors, this just spins the stir bar in almost complete silence.

The quality of this unit belies its low price. The packaging, the magnetic stir bars, and stir bar retriever tool are also much higher quality than I'd expected, and I'm VERY impressed with quality and value of this stirrer.I use this unit to restructure water….it works perfect…..absolutely quiet. I only hear the magnet spinning on the glass, the unit itself, is super easy to use, and super quiet, I use it almost daily, running sometimes 24 hours, no problems, well worth the money…I’ve had it about 2 months now, so it’s still newish, love it.I got this for some stuff I need to shake and mix for about 5 minutes a few times a month but I find that I use it every day. I make my coffee and put my normal ridiculous amount of sugar and creamer in it, drop the little pill looking stirrer in it and BAM. Not even a sugar crystal left in the bottom of the cup once I'm finished.

I also have some non-dishwasher safe, plastic juice containers that I used to have to use a bottle brush on but now I just put some soap and water in the bottle and let this mixer do the washing.

I use a bent paper clip to fish the magnetic stirrer out of the glass for hot coffee. The paper clip picks it right up and I rinse it off and am ready to use it again.

Very cool little piece of tech.works great for stirring CerakoteI bought this to agitate yeast in a yeast starter for fermenting beer. The stir plate is quiet and does not throw the magnet once the yeast begins to build up in the slurry. Very happy.everything works perfectEs un equipo de una marca que es muy eficiente y segura. Todo okWorked as needed would but again!!I bought this for yeast starters (home brewing). I originally wanted to get a heated stir plate but it was not worth 4x the price. This one has been great. I've run it for 36 hours straight with no issues.

Comes with the stir rod
It holds a vortex in ~1L of liquid
It's pretty quiet, I don't notice it even at max speed.
The BEST thing is the size. It's as small as it could be and still hold a 1L Erlenmeyer flask.
